title: Auto Update when a cell changes in a column between two connected Boards

posts.author: patpen (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
Is it possible to to update a column on one board and have it automatically update on another board that its connected to?

IE- Phone number changed on “main board” and I want to have the phone number updated on the other board it’s connected to without having to change it both boards.

TIA!

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi patpen,

You need to connect the 2 boards, select 2-way connection then add a Connect Boards column.
See https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/360000635139-The-Connect-Boards-Column for all details

posts.author: patpen (Patrick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks again for your help GCavin!!

Trying to build out my Monday.com for my mortgage business and all of this is very helpful.

If there’s anything else you recommend me check out, please let me know.
